import{useEffect}from"react";import{useLocation}from"react-router-dom";/**
 * Scrolls the window to the top whenever the route path changes.
 * Hash-only changes on the same path (e.g. blog sommaire #section) are left to the browser.
 */export default function ScrollToTop(){const{pathname}=useLocation();useEffect(()=>{window.scrollTo(0,0);},[pathname]);return null;}
